title: Sandpaper Set, 14 Sheets 400 to 2000 Grit Fine Sand Paper, Wet and Dry Sandpaper for Wood, Walls, Glass, Plastic and Car Paintwork Sanding, 9 x 3.6 Inches
features: Package Contains: 14pcs including 7 different grit grades mouse detail sandpaper: 400, 600 ,800, 1000, 1200, 1500, 2000 grits, 2 of each type. coarse to fine, almost all polishing requirements are met
Size: 9 x 3.6 inches and can also be cut into any size as needed
Material: Made of waterproof silicon carbide for high grinding efficiency in wet and dry sanding
Perfect for: Emery paper widely used in the grinding and polishing of metal and non-metal, wood, rubber, leather, plastic, stone, glass and other materials
Easy to Identify: The grit of each sheet of sandpaper is printed on the back for easy identification
